input.background: We have established a scenario in which four patients are treated with an intervention that is successful 75% of the time. The number of patients who respond to treatment is a binomial random variable with parameters n = 4 and p = 0.75. It follows that probability of a failureg = 1 - p=1 - 0.75= 0.25.
input.question: What is the probability of one success?

output.method: 事件发生概率及独立性

n.description: The number of trials or patients treated in the binomial experiment.

p.description: The probability of success for each trial in the binomial experiment.

failure_prob.description: The probability of failure for each trial, calculated as 1 - p.

success_count.description: The number of successes for which the probability is being calculated.
